parsed.production_notes: The video features natural human movements, genuine facial expressions, and spontaneous laughter. The lighting is realistic, and there are no visual artifacts typical of AI generation, such as distorted fingers or uncanny facial features.

characters.appearance: Male in his mid-20s with a slim build and light complexion. He has short brown hair and a thin mustache. His facial features are expressive and animated.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a plain white t-shirt with a small graphic on the left chest.
characters.demeanor: Playful, willing to try, and easily laughs at his own mistakes.

characters.appearance: Female in her mid-20s with a slim build and light complexion. She has long, straight dark hair parted in the middle. Her expressions are warm and encouraging.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a black spaghetti strap top and a white smartwatch on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Supportive, amused, and confident in her abilities.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime, plain white wall with a slanted ceiling, black gaming chair.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man and woman are seated closely together in an indoor setting. Character A is positioned on the left, sitting in a black gaming chair. Character B sits to his right, leaning in comfortably towards him. They are both looking downwards, focusing their attention on an unseen object held below the frame. The lighting is soft and natural, illuminating their faces evenly. The background consists of a plain white wall that meets a slanted ceiling. Character A speaks first with a slight smile, followed by Character B who also smiles warmly. The camera maintains a steady medium close-up shot throughout.

scenes.visual_description: The composite shot shows the couple sitting together with a large app interface overlaid in the lower center of the screen. Text overlays at the top label the man as 'Immigrant Boyfriend' and the woman as 'Native Girlfriend'. Another text overlay reads 'American accent app'. The app UI shows the word 'sixth' and a circular progress bar that fills up and changes color based on their pronunciation scores. Character A gets a low score, and Character B gets a high score.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Six.
Character B says: Sixth.
scenes.on_screen_text: Immigrant Boyfriend. Native Girlfriend. American accent app. Practice My Text. Coach Ethan. Let's start! Tap the button below and say the word. sixth. Compare my pronunciation to yours and then try recording the word again. 64%. Great improvement, let's keep going! 99%.

The framing stays consistent as a medium close-up, capturing their upper bodies and facial reactions. The soft lighting continues to highlight their features against the minimalist white background. Their body language is relaxed and intimate, indicating a comfortable dynamic.

The black gaming chair on the left contrasts with the bright white walls behind them. Their shared laughter highlights a playful and supportive atmosphere.
